filtered_articles.title: Gears of War: E-Day Preorders Are Live for Xbox Fans: Here's What Comes in Each Edition
filtered_articles.description: Gears of War: E-Day is now available to preorder from a variety of retailers. Here's what editions are available and what comes with each one ahead of its October 6 release date.

filtered_articles.title: Preorder Elden Ring Tarnished Edition on Switch 2 at £10 off RRP
filtered_articles.description: Elden Ring Tarnished Edition preorders are live for Switch 2, and Smyths has the cheapest UK price at £59.99.

filtered_articles.title: Fable Preorders Are Live for Xbox and PS5: Here's What Comes in Each Edition
filtered_articles.description: Fable preorders are officially live for Xbox and PS5! Find out what is included in the Standard, Premium, and Collector's editions, plus how to get early access.
